nasb.text: So all the Egyptians dug around the Nile for water to drink, for they could not drink of the water of the Nile.

esv.text: And all the Egyptians dug along the Nile for water to drink, for they could not drink the water of the Nile.

cnv.text: 所有的埃及人都在河的周圍掘地，要得水喝，因為他們不能喝這河裡的水。

ccb.text: 因为河水不能饮用，埃及人就在尼罗河两岸掘井取水饮用。
